results.snippet: ⚡ The One-Sentence Verdict No single model wins May 2026 . Claude Opus 4.7 for complex coding. GPT-5.5 for agentic terminal work. Gemini 3.1 Pro for reasoning and multimodal at the lowest major-lab price. DeepSeek V4-Flash when cost is the primary constraint. Kimi K2.6 for the best open-weight coding value.
